display_text.zh: 计算机科学

description.en: Broad computing major suitable for software, web, data, testing, and security internship tracks.
description.zh: 覆盖面较广的计算机专业，适合软件、网页、数据、测试和安全相关实习方向。
description.ms: Bidang pengkomputeran yang luas, sesuai untuk trek perisian, web, data, ujian dan keselamatan.

display_text.zh: 软件工程

description.en: Best aligned with software development, QA, web development, and systems analysis internships.
description.zh: 最适合软件开发、软件测试、网页开发和系统分析相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk latihan industri pembangunan perisian, QA, pembangunan web dan analisis sistem.

display_text.zh: 信息系统

description.en: Connects business needs with IT systems, databases, support, and systems analysis roles.
description.zh: 连接业务需求与 IT 系统，适合数据库、技术支持和系统分析相关岗位。
description.ms: Menghubungkan keperluan bisnes dengan sistem IT, pangkalan data, sokongan dan analisis sistem.

display_text.zh: 数据科学 / 人工智能

description.en: Best aligned with data analysis, business intelligence, data engineering, and AI/ML internships.
description.zh: 适合数据分析、商业智能、数据工程和 AI/ML 相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk analisis data, kecerdasan bisnes, kejuruteraan data dan latihan AI/ML.

display_text.zh: 网络安全

description.en: Best aligned with information security, SOC, network support, and IT operations internships.
description.zh: 适合信息安全、SOC、网络支持和 IT 运维相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk keselamatan maklumat, SOC, sokongan rangkaian dan operasi IT.

display_text.zh: 商业分析

description.en: Best aligned with data analyst, business analyst, product analyst, and BI internship tracks.
description.zh: 适合数据分析、业务分析、产品分析和 BI 相关实习方向。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk trek penganalisis data, penganalisis bisnes, penganalisis produk dan BI.

display_text.zh: 多媒体 / IT / 数字媒体

description.en: Best aligned with front-end, web development, UI/UX, and digital design internships.
description.zh: 适合前端、网页开发、UI/UX 和数字设计相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk front-end, pembangunan web, UI/UX dan reka bentuk digital.

display_text.zh: 其他 IT 相关专业

description.en: A general IT-related path. The system recommends broader support, analyst, testing, and junior developer roles.
description.zh: 通用 IT 相关方向，系统会推荐较宽泛的支持、分析、测试和初级开发岗位。
description.ms: Laluan IT umum. Sistem mencadangkan peranan sokongan, analisis, ujian dan pembangun junior.

display_text.zh: 会计 / 金融

description.en: Suitable for accounting, audit, banking, finance, risk, and business analysis internships.
description.zh: 适合会计、审计、银行、金融、风险和业务分析相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk latihan perakaunan, audit, perbankan, kewangan, risiko dan analisis bisnes.

display_text.zh: 工商管理 / 人力资源

description.en: Suitable for operations, HR, project coordination, administration, and management trainee internships.
description.zh: 适合运营、人力资源、项目协调、行政和管理培训生相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk operasi, HR, koordinasi projek, pentadbiran dan latihan pengurusan.

display_text.zh: 市场营销 / 传播

description.en: Suitable for digital marketing, content, public relations, branding, media, and market research internships.
description.zh: 适合数字营销、内容、公关、品牌、媒体和市场研究相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk pemasaran digital, kandungan, PR, jenama, media dan penyelidikan pasaran.

display_text.zh: 经济学 / 统计 / 数学

description.en: Suitable for data, market research, finance, policy research, actuarial, and analytics internships.
description.zh: 适合数据、市场研究、金融、政策研究、精算和分析类实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk data, penyelidikan pasaran, kewangan, dasar, aktuari dan analitik.

display_text.zh: 法律 / 公共政策 / 国际关系

description.en: Suitable for legal, compliance, policy research, public administration, NGO, and international relations internships.
description.zh: 适合法律、合规、政策研究、公共行政、NGO 和国际关系相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk undang-undang, pematuhan, penyelidikan dasar, pentadbiran awam, NGO dan hubungan antarabangsa.

display_text.zh: 心理学 / 社会科学

description.en: Suitable for human services, research, HR, community work, education support, and market research internships.
description.zh: 适合社会服务、研究、人力资源、社区工作、教育支持和市场研究相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk perkhidmatan manusia, penyelidikan, HR, kerja komuniti, sokongan pendidikan dan penyelidikan pasaran.

display_text.zh: 教育 / TESL / 语言教育

description.en: Suitable for teaching assistant, tutoring, curriculum, training, and education technology internships.
description.zh: 适合教学助理、辅导、课程设计、培训和教育科技相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk pembantu pengajar, tutor, kurikulum, latihan dan teknologi pendidikan.

display_text.zh: 大众传播 / 新闻 / 媒体

description.en: Suitable for journalism, public relations, social media, content production, and corporate communication internships.
description.zh: 适合新闻、公关、社交媒体、内容制作和企业传播相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk kewartawanan, PR, media sosial, penghasilan kandungan dan komunikasi korporat.

display_text.zh: 艺术 / 设计 / 创意媒体

description.en: Suitable for graphic design, UI/UX, multimedia, branding, content, and creative production internships.
description.zh: 适合平面设计、UI/UX、多媒体、品牌、内容和创意制作相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk reka bentuk grafik, UI/UX, multimedia, jenama, kandungan dan produksi kreatif.

display_text.zh: 工程 / 制造

description.en: Suitable for engineering, manufacturing, quality, project coordination, operations, and R&D internships.
description.zh: 适合工程、制造、质量、项目协调、运营和研发相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk kejuruteraan, pembuatan, kualiti, koordinasi projek, operasi dan R&D.

display_text.zh: 电气 / 电子 / 通信工程

description.en: Suitable for electronics, electrical, telecommunications, embedded systems, testing, and infrastructure internships.
description.zh: 适合电子、电气、通信、嵌入式、测试和基础设施相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk elektronik, elektrik, telekomunikasi, sistem terbenam, ujian dan infrastruktur.

display_text.zh: 机械 / 机电工程

description.en: Suitable for mechanical design, manufacturing, maintenance, automation, quality, and production internships.
description.zh: 适合机械设计、制造、维护、自动化、质量和生产相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk reka bentuk mekanikal, pembuatan, penyelenggaraan, automasi, kualiti dan pengeluaran.

display_text.zh: 土木工程 / 建筑 / 工料测量
display_text.ms: Kejuruteraan Awam / Seni Bina / Ukur Bahan

description.en: Suitable for construction, site, design, quantity surveying, project coordination, and built environment internships.
description.zh: 适合施工、现场、设计、工料测量、项目协调和建筑环境相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk pembinaan, tapak, reka bentuk, ukur bahan, koordinasi projek dan alam bina.

display_text.zh: 健康科学 / 生物医学 / 药剂

description.en: Suitable for healthcare administration, clinical research support, laboratory, public health, and biomedical internships.
description.zh: 适合医疗行政、临床研究支持、实验室、公共卫生和生物医学相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk pentadbiran kesihatan, sokongan penyelidikan klinikal, makmal, kesihatan awam dan bioperubatan.

display_text.zh: 生命科学 / 环境科学

description.en: Suitable for laboratory, research, environmental, sustainability, quality, and agriculture/food science internships.
description.zh: 适合实验室、研究、环境、可持续发展、质量和农业/食品科学相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk makmal, penyelidikan, alam sekitar, kelestarian, kualiti dan sains pertanian/makanan.

display_text.zh: 酒店管理 / 旅游 / 餐饮服务

description.en: Suitable for hotel operations, tourism, guest services, events, food service, and customer success internships.
description.zh: 适合酒店运营、旅游、宾客服务、活动、餐饮服务和客户成功相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk operasi hotel, pelancongan, perkhidmatan tetamu, acara, makanan dan kejayaan pelanggan.

display_text.zh: 物流 / 供应链 / 运输

description.en: Suitable for logistics, procurement, warehousing, transportation, operations, and supply chain analysis internships.
description.zh: 适合物流、采购、仓储、运输、运营和供应链分析相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk logistik, perolehan, gudang, pengangkutan, operasi dan analisis rantaian bekalan.

display_text.zh: 农业 / 食品科学 / 兽医

description.en: Suitable for agriculture, food science, lab, quality assurance, sustainability, and field operations internships.
description.zh: 适合农业、食品科学、实验室、质量保证、可持续发展和现场运营相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk pertanian, sains makanan, makmal, jaminan kualiti, kelestarian dan operasi lapangan.

display_text.zh: 语言 / 语言学 / 翻译

description.en: Suitable for translation, content, teaching support, communication, localization, and editorial internships.
description.zh: 适合翻译、内容、教学支持、传播、本地化和编辑相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk terjemahan, kandungan, sokongan pengajaran, komunikasi, lokalisasi dan editorial.

display_text.zh: 运动科学 / 休闲管理

description.en: Suitable for sports coaching support, fitness, recreation management, events, wellness, and community program internships.
description.zh: 适合运动教练支持、健身、休闲管理、活动、健康促进和社区项目相关实习。
description.ms: Sesuai untuk sokongan jurulatih, kecergasan, rekreasi, acara, kesejahteraan dan program komuniti.

display_text.zh: 软件工程方向

fit_notes.low: Start with junior programming or QA roles while building stronger project evidence.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for developer internships that match your project stack and programming basics.
fit_notes.high: You can target more competitive software engineering internships and explain project trade-offs.

display_text.zh: 网页 / 前端开发方向

fit_notes.low: Use small web tasks to build portfolio evidence before applying widely.
fit_notes.medium: Apply to front-end or web internships and show GitHub/README proof.
fit_notes.high: Target web roles that expect deployed demos, usability awareness, and clear project explanation.

display_text.zh: 数据分析方向

fit_notes.low: Start with reporting or data support roles while improving SQL/Python and project explanation.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for data analyst roles that require spreadsheets, SQL, Python, and clear reporting.
fit_notes.high: You can target data science or analytics engineering internships with stronger project evidence.

display_text.zh: AI / 机器学习方向

fit_notes.low: Build a simple ML/data project first and learn to explain the model goal and result.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for AI/ML support roles when you can show a working project and basic concepts.
fit_notes.high: Target AI engineering or ML internship roles that expect coding, data, and model explanation.

display_text.zh: 网络安全方向

fit_notes.low: Begin with IT support or security operations assistant roles while strengthening technical fundamentals.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for SOC or cybersecurity internships if you can discuss basic security practices and tools.
fit_notes.high: Target security analyst internships that require monitoring, vulnerability awareness, and clear reporting.

display_text.zh: 系统分析方向

fit_notes.low: Start with documentation or systems assistant tasks while learning job requirements.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for IT analyst internships that need communication plus technical basics.
fit_notes.high: Target systems analyst internships where you can connect business needs and IT solutions.

display_text.zh: 业务分析 / 产品分析方向

fit_notes.low: Use reporting/support roles to build business context and communication evidence.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for business analyst roles when you can compare job descriptions and explain requirements.
fit_notes.high: Target BI/product analyst internships that expect structured thinking and stakeholder communication.

display_text.zh: 数据库 / 数据工程方向

fit_notes.low: Build SQL/database basics before aiming for data engineering roles.
fit_notes.medium: Apply to SQL/data internships where database basics are enough for entry-level tasks.
fit_notes.high: Target data engineering or database roles that expect stronger SQL and system understanding.

display_text.zh: 软件测试 / QA 方向

fit_notes.low: QA roles can be a practical entry point while you improve programming and project depth.
fit_notes.medium: Apply to QA internships and show basic testing logic, Git, and issue reporting.
fit_notes.high: Target QA automation roles if you can code tests and explain software behavior.

display_text.zh: IT 支持 / 运维方向

fit_notes.low: IT support is suitable as an early internship target while building technical foundation.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for technical support or IT operations internships and highlight communication skills.
fit_notes.high: Target infrastructure or cloud support roles if you also have projects and strong fundamentals.

display_text.zh: 网络 / 基础设施方向

fit_notes.low: Start with support roles and build networking fundamentals gradually.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for network support roles if you can explain troubleshooting and basic systems.
fit_notes.high: Target infrastructure roles that expect stronger technical foundation and teamwork.

display_text.zh: UI/UX 与数字设计方向

fit_notes.low: Prepare a small portfolio or design/project showcase before applying widely.
fit_notes.medium: Apply to UI/UX roles when your portfolio explains goals, users, and design decisions.
fit_notes.high: Target product design or front-end UI internships with a polished portfolio and demo.

display_text.zh: 会计 / 审计 / 税务

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Accuracy, documents, and role-specific preparation matter.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Accuracy, documents, and role-specific preparation matter.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Accuracy, documents, and role-specific preparation matter.

display_text.zh: 金融 / 银行 / 风险

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Business awareness, reporting, and professional materials are important.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Business awareness, reporting, and professional materials are important.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Business awareness, reporting, and professional materials are important.

display_text.zh: 市场营销 / 数字营销

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Portfolio, campaign examples, and communication evidence improve fit.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Portfolio, campaign examples, and communication evidence improve fit.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Portfolio, campaign examples, and communication evidence improve fit.

display_text.zh: 公共关系 / 企业传播

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Writing samples and stakeholder communication evidence are useful.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Writing samples and stakeholder communication evidence are useful.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Writing samples and stakeholder communication evidence are useful.

display_text.zh: 内容 / 社交媒体 / 创意制作

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. A portfolio or sample work helps the system recommend stronger creative roles.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. A portfolio or sample work helps the system recommend stronger creative roles.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. A portfolio or sample work helps the system recommend stronger creative roles.

display_text.zh: 市场研究 / 消费者洞察

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Research, analysis, and reporting evidence affect the fit.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Research, analysis, and reporting evidence affect the fit.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Research, analysis, and reporting evidence affect the fit.

display_text.zh: 人力资源 / 人才招聘

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Communication, teamwork, and professionalism are key signals.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Communication, teamwork, and professionalism are key signals.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Communication, teamwork, and professionalism are key signals.

display_text.zh: 业务运营 / 行政管理

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Task tracking and follow-up improve readiness for operations roles.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Task tracking and follow-up improve readiness for operations roles.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Task tracking and follow-up improve readiness for operations roles.

display_text.zh: 项目协调

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Past project responsibility and tracking evidence help.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Past project responsibility and tracking evidence help.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Past project responsibility and tracking evidence help.

display_text.zh: 法律 / 合规

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Professional documents, writing, and careful role research are important.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Professional documents, writing, and careful role research are important.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Professional documents, writing, and careful role research are important.

fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Research synthesis and stakeholder communication improve fit.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Research synthesis and stakeholder communication improve fit.

fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Service experience and teamwork evidence are useful.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Service experience and teamwork evidence are useful.

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. The system recommends supervised support roles; clinical duties may require further qualifications.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. The system recommends supervised support roles; clinical duties may require further qualifications.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. The system recommends supervised support roles; clinical duties may require further qualifications.

fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Presentation, communication, and supervised teaching evidence matter.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Presentation, communication, and supervised teaching evidence matter.

fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Writing, media samples, and deadline readiness improve fit.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Writing, media samples, and deadline readiness improve fit.

fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. A portfolio or project showcase is especially important.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. A portfolio or project showcase is especially important.

display_text.zh: 采购 / 供应商管理

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Documentation and stakeholder communication improve fit.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Documentation and stakeholder communication improve fit.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Documentation and stakeholder communication improve fit.

display_text.zh: 农业 / 食品科学

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Lab/field evidence and quality awareness improve fit.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Lab/field evidence and quality awareness improve fit.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Lab/field evidence and quality awareness improve fit.

display_text.zh: 翻译 / 本地化 / 语言内容

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Writing or translation samples are important evidence.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Writing or translation samples are important evidence.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Writing or translation samples are important evidence.

display_text.zh: 运动 / 健身 / 休闲

fit_notes.low: Start with supervised support roles. Supervised service, planning, and teamwork evidence matter.
fit_notes.medium: Apply for standard internship roles when your materials and role research are ready. Supervised service, planning, and teamwork evidence matter.
fit_notes.high: Target more competitive or analyst-style internships. Supervised service, planning, and teamwork evidence matter.

use_tip.en: Search role keywords with 'intern' and turn on job alerts; update LinkedIn before applying.
use_tip.zh: 用岗位关键词加 intern 搜索并开启提醒；投递前先完善 LinkedIn。
use_tip.ms: Cari kata kunci peranan bersama 'intern' dan hidupkan amaran kerja; kemas kini LinkedIn sebelum memohon.

use_tip.en: Use ICT and internship filters, then save searches for your selected role titles.
use_tip.zh: 使用 ICT 和 internship 筛选，再保存与你目标岗位相关的搜索。
use_tip.ms: Gunakan penapis ICT dan internship, kemudian simpan carian untuk tajuk peranan sasaran.

use_tip.en: Upload a prepared resume and search by internship title or company name.
use_tip.zh: 上传已准备好的简历，并用实习岗位名称或公司名称搜索。
use_tip.ms: Muat naik resume yang siap dan cari mengikut tajuk latihan industri atau nama syarikat.

use_tip.en: Use it to explore structured internships and compare internship categories before applying.
use_tip.zh: 用于探索结构化实习，并在申请前比较不同实习类别。
use_tip.ms: Gunakan untuk meneroka latihan industri berstruktur dan membandingkan kategori sebelum memohon.

use_tip.en: Browse IT, data, cyber security, and graduate internship categories; also read CV/interview advice.
use_tip.zh: 浏览 IT、数据、网络安全和毕业生实习类别，也可以查看 CV/面试建议。
use_tip.ms: Layari kategori IT, data, keselamatan siber dan latihan graduan; baca juga nasihat CV/temu duga.

use_tip.en: If your university provides access, create saved searches and job alerts for your target role.
use_tip.zh: 如果学校提供访问权限，可以为目标岗位创建 saved search 和 job alert。
use_tip.ms: Jika universiti menyediakan akses, cipta carian tersimpan dan amaran kerja untuk peranan sasaran.

use_tip.en: Browse jobs and internships by sector such as engineering, business, marketing, and sustainability.
use_tip.zh: 按工程、商业、市场、可持续发展等行业浏览 graduate jobs 和 internships。
use_tip.ms: Layari pekerjaan dan latihan mengikut sektor seperti kejuruteraan, bisnes, pemasaran dan kelestarian.

source_notes.bls_computer_it: BLS Computer and Information Technology occupations were used to define broad IT role families.
source_notes.bls_software_developers: BLS Software Developers, QA Analysts, and Testers were used for software and testing role tracks.
source_notes.bls_web_developers: BLS Web Developers and Digital Designers were used for web and UI/digital design role tracks.
source_notes.bls_information_security: BLS Information Security Analysts were used for cybersecurity role tracks.
source_notes.bls_systems_analysts: BLS Computer Systems Analysts were used for systems analyst role tracks.
source_notes.bls_database: BLS Database Administrators and Architects were used for database role tracks.
source_notes.bls_data_scientists: BLS Data Scientists were used for data analysis, data science, and AI/ML role tracks.
source_notes.onet_software_developers: O*NET Software Developers task descriptions were used to identify software development signals.
source_notes.onet_data_scientists: O*NET Data Scientists task descriptions were used to identify analytics, visualization, and ML signals.
source_notes.onet_information_security: O*NET Information Security Analysts task descriptions were used to identify cybersecurity signals.
source_notes.ku_information_systems: University of Kansas Information Systems career paths were used for IS-related tracks.
source_notes.tamu_mis: Texas A&M MIS career ideas were used for business/IT analyst mappings.
source_notes.wisconsin_information_systems: Wisconsin Information Systems career paths were used for business analyst, systems analyst, database, and BI mappings.
source_notes.umich_data_science: University of Michigan Data Science track was used for data science entry-level titles and preparation ideas.
source_notes.linkedin_jobs: LinkedIn Jobs was used as a public job/internship search platform reference.
source_notes.jobstreet_internships: JobStreet Malaysia internships search was used as a Malaysia internship platform reference.
source_notes.hiredly_internships: Hiredly internships page was used as a Malaysia internship platform reference.
source_notes.mynext: MyNext by TalentCorp Malaysia was used as a structured internship and career exploration platform reference.
source_notes.prosple_malaysia: Prosple Malaysia was used as a student internship and fresh graduate platform reference.
source_notes.handshake_search: Handshake job/internship search guidance was used as a university career portal reference.
source_notes.bls_business_financial: BLS Business and Financial occupations were used for accounting, finance, HR, market research, logistics, procurement, and analyst role families.
source_notes.bls_architecture_engineering: BLS Architecture and Engineering occupations were used for engineering, electrical/electronic, mechanical, civil, manufacturing, and built environment role families.
source_notes.bls_management: BLS Management occupations were used for operations, marketing, HR management, hospitality, event, and project coordination role families.
source_notes.bls_ooh_home: BLS OOH occupation groups were used to cover non-IT fields such as media, education, legal, healthcare, science, social service, and arts/design.
source_notes.bls_logisticians: BLS Logisticians were used to support logistics and supply chain role-track mapping.
source_notes.umaine_major_exploration: University of Maine What Can I Do With This Major was used to broaden the major list beyond IT and CS.
source_notes.ttu_major_exploration: Texas Tech University What Can I Do With This Major was used as a broad major-to-career exploration reference.
source_notes.towson_major_resources: Towson Career Resources by Major was used to support broad major categories, internship resources, and sample career titles.
source_notes.mtsu_major_guides: MTSU What Can I Do With A Major In guides were used to support broad university major categories and the idea that major does not rigidly determine career.
source_notes.ku_careers: University of Kansas Careers database was used to show that many careers accept multiple majors and value experience and skills.
source_notes.umich_psychology: University of Michigan Psychology career guide was used for psychology, research, communication, and human services role mapping.
source_notes.georgetown_psychology: Georgetown Psychology major guide was used for psychology-related skills and cross-industry options such as HR, consulting, advertising, business, and marketing.
source_notes.gradmalaysia: gradmalaysia job and internship categories were used for Malaysia-focused broad internship families such as business, engineering, marketing, and sustainability.
